macro_intent: Eval S6: N1 security fail then N2/N3 cascade without running.

N1.description: Add subprocess.call with shell=True for user commands (triggers bandit).

task.intent: In eval_fixtures/eval_unsafe.py add a function run_cmd(cmd: str) -> None that runs subprocess.call(cmd, shell=True). Do not use any other approach.
task.acceptance_criteria: Function exists and runs shell commands.

N2.description: Would edit header if N1 passed (should never run).

task.intent: Add a short comment at the top of src/components/header.js: // eval-s6-N2

N3.description: Would edit header if N2 passed (should never run).
